title: Regions, Branches and Offices - Canada.ca
content:
## Regions, Branches and Offices
You may find contact information for organizations through Health Canada's organizational structure .
Do you want to contact one of our regional headquarters ?
- Northwest Territories, Yukon, Nunavut
Federal Building Sinclair Centre 218-757 Hastings St W Vancouver, BC V6C 1A1
Telephone: 1-866-225-0709 Facsimile: 604-666-6024 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Suite 710, Canada Place 9700 Jasper Avenue Edmonton, AB T5J 4C3
Telephone: 780-495-6815 Facsimile: 780-495-5551 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Lower level, Alvin Hamilton Building 1783 Hamilton Street Regina, Saskatchewan S4P 2B6
Telephone: 306-780-5449 or 306-780-5038 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
391 York Avenue, Suite 100 Winnipeg, MB R3C 0P4
Telephone: 204-983-4199 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
180 Queen Street West Toronto, ON M5V 3L7
Telephone: 1-866-225-0709
Guy-Favreau Complex East Tower 200 René-Lévesque Blvd. West Montreal, QC H2Z 1X4
Telephone: 1-866-225-0709 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Suite 1918, 1505 Barrington Street Halifax, NS B3J 3Y6
Telephone: 1-866-225-0709 Facsimile: 902-426-6659 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)

## Northwest Territories, Yukon, Nunavut
